title: Who?
content:
My friend must be a bird,
    Because it flies!
    Mortal my friend must be,
    Because it dies!
    Barbs has it, like a bee.
    Ah, curious friend,
    Thou puzzlest me!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "Who?", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
